This '''[[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]]''' was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle owned by [[Watto/Legends|Watto]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was a sleek, thin-bodied speeder with a tall tail fin and side-mounted engines.

Prior to his fateful meeting with [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] piloted Watto's landspeeder to a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] sale at [[Mochot Steep/Legends|Mochot Steep]]. On the return journey, Anakin encountered and assisted a wounded [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]].

{{Veh-stub}}
